name: Person Profile Card
description: Person profile card with avatar placeholder, name, role, affiliation, tags, and bio context

fields.TITLE_TEXT: Small label at top, e.g. 'THREAT ACTOR PROFILE' or 'KEY FIGURE'
fields.LABEL_3: Affiliation or location, e.g. 'Scattered Spider / UNC3944'
fields.CONTEXT_TEXT: 2-3 sentence bio or description of the person and their role in the story
